name: @aws-cbd/anonymity-core
description: Blind-signed one-time tokens delivering mathematical anonymity (prototype). RFC 9474 RSABSSA, no ZK circuit, no trusted setup; single audited runtime dependency (@cloudflare/blindrsa-ts).

scripts.test: node --experimental-strip-types --disable-warning=ExperimentalWarning --test test/blind-rsa.test.ts test/properties.test.ts test/encoding.test.ts test/key-lifecycle.test.ts test/merkle-log.test.ts test/audit.test.ts
